mapper.select:
SELECT ci.public_id AS class_public_id, ci.name, COALESCE(ci.description, '') AS description, COALESCE(ui.public_id, '') AS creator_public_id, ci.is_public FROM class_info ci LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = ci.teacher_user_id AND ui.is_del = 0 WHERE ci.is_del = 0 AND ( 1 = 1 ci.is_public = 1 OR ci.teacher_user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_student_rel cmr WHERE cmr.class_id = ci.id AND cmr.user_id = #{userId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 )
) ORDER BY ci.id DESC

SELECT ui.public_id AS user_public_id, ui.username, cmr.joined_at FROM class_student_rel cmr INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = cmr.user_id WHERE cmr.class_id = #{classId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 AND ui.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cmr.joined_at DESC, cmr.id DESC

SELECT ps.public_id AS id, ps.title AS title FROM class_problem_set_rel cpsr INNER JOIN problem_set ps ON ps.id = cpsr.problem_set_id WHERE cpsr.class_id = #{classId} AND cpsr.is_del = 0 AND ps.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cpsr.id DESC

SELECT c.public_id AS id, c.title AS title FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN contest c ON c.id = ccr.contest_id WHERE ccr.class_id = #{classId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0 ORDER BY ccr.id DESC

SELECT ps.public_id AS problem_set_public_id, ps.title AS title, COUNT(DISTINCT pspr.problem_id) AS problem_count, COALESCE(SUM(ac_sub.ac_flag), 0) AS total_student_ac_count FROM class_problem_set_rel cpsr INNER JOIN problem_set ps ON ps.id = cpsr.problem_set_id AND ps.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN problem_set_problem_rel pspr ON pspr.problem_set_id = ps.id AND pspr.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s.user_id, s.problem_id, 1 AS ac_flag FROM submission s INNER JOIN class_student_rel csr2 ON csr2.user_id = s.user_id AND csr2.class_id = #{classId} AND csr2.is_del = 0 WHERE s.verdict = 'Accepted' AND s.is_del = 0 GROUP BY s.user_id, s.problem_id ) ac_sub ON ac_sub.problem_id = pspr.problem_id WHERE cpsr.class_id = #{classId} AND cpsr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY ps.id, ps.public_id, ps.title ORDER BY MIN(cpsr.id) ASC

SELECT ui.public_id AS user_public_id, ui.username AS username, COUNT(DISTINCT s.problem_id) AS ac_count FROM class_student_rel csr INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = csr.user_id AND ui.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT pspr2.problem_id FROM class_problem_set_rel cpsr2 INNER JOIN problem_set_problem_rel pspr2 ON pspr2.problem_set_id = cpsr2.problem_set_id AND pspr2.is_del = 0 WHERE cpsr2.class_id = #{classId} AND cpsr2.is_del = 0 ) all_problems ON 1 = 1 LEFT JOIN submission s ON s.user_id = csr.user_id AND s.problem_id = all_problems.problem_id AND s.verdict = 'Accepted' AND s.is_del = 0 WHERE csr.class_id = #{classId} AND csr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY ui.public_id, ui.username ORDER BY ac_count DESC, ui.username ASC

SELECT ui.public_id AS user_public_id, ui.username AS username, p.pid AS pid, p.title AS problem_title, pspr.sort_order AS sort_order, MAX(CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN 2 WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS best_status FROM class_student_rel csr INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = csr.user_id AND ui.is_del = 0 CROSS JOIN problem_set_problem_rel pspr ON pspr.problem_set_id = #{problemSetId} AND pspr.is_del = 0 INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = pspr.problem_id AND p.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN submission s ON s.user_id = csr.user_id AND s.problem_id = pspr.problem_id AND s.is_del = 0 WHERE csr.class_id = #{classId} AND csr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY ui.public_id, ui.username, p.pid, p.title, pspr.sort_order ORDER BY ui.username ASC, pspr.sort_order ASC
